Synchronization of application data and UI using message passing, dictionary operations, and callbacks.


## Files
- **[app_sync.c](app_sync.c.md)**: Implements synchronization of application data using message passing and dictionary operations.
- **[app_sync.h](app_sync.h.md)**: UI synchronization layer for AppMessage, managing dictionary updates and callbacks in Pebble apps.
